calculation.formula: familiarity_score = intersection(short_term_top_tracks, medium_term_top_tracks) / short_term_top_tracks_count
Count unique artists across short-term top tracks and compute primary_artist_share = top_artist_track_count / top_tracks_count

calculation.method: Use recently played tracks, dedupe by track id, bucket local hours into morning/afternoon/evening/late-night, then compute ratios.
calculation.confidenceRule: HIGH if deduped_count >= 25 and distinct_dates >= 2 and time_span_hours >= 18; otherwise LOW

categorizationRules: MORNING_STARTER if confidence HIGH and morning_ratio >= 0.50
DAYTIME_DRIFTER if confidence HIGH and afternoon_ratio >= 0.45
EVENING_UNWINDER if confidence HIGH and evening_ratio >= 0.45
AFTER_HOURS if confidence HIGH and late_night_ratio >= 0.40

calculation.method: Analyze owned playlists with at least 1 track, compute size distribution and concentration metrics.

categorizationRules: WORLD_BUILDER if one_big_share >= 0.35 OR (large_count >= 2 and substantial_count <= 6)
POWER_CURATOR if playlist_count >= 35 and total_tracks >= 1500 and substantial_count >= 15
MICRO_CURATOR if micro_count >= 12 and micro_share >= 0.35 and substantial_ratio < 0.45
